title: AppLovin: This Plunge In Price Presents A Great Opportunity (Rating Upgrade)
text: The past year has been incredibly painful for shareholders of AppLovin Corporation, as shares of the business plunged in response to a weakening in some parts of the firm. Other aspects of the AppLovin Corporation business, however, remain strong and growing, and investors should look there for opportunity.

title: Most Oversold Stocks In The Information Technology Sector: AppLovin, PagSeguro Digital And More - Marathon Digital Holdings (NASDAQ:MARA), AppLovin (NASDAQ:APP)
text: The most oversold stocks in the information technology sector presents an opportunity to buy into undervalued companies.

title: Why AppLovin Stock Was Plummeting This Week
text: The company is badly in need of some share-price-boosting good news.

title: Applovin, Unity Software get downgrade as analyst sees mobile game crunch into 2024
text: Applovin Corp. and Unity Software Inc. both received downgrades to their respective stocks Thursday after one analyst said he expects a squeeze on mobile gaming revenue could last well into 2024.

title: The Top (and Bottom) Five Stocks of 2022
text: Occidental Petroleum, Constellation Energy, Antero Resources, Texas Pacific Land, and Signify Health are the top stocks of the year. The bottom five are Affirm Holdings, AppLovin, Wayfair, Coinbase Global, and Twilio.
